<!-- How would you address it? If you have multiple ideas, list them. -->

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why aren't they preferred? -->

## Scope check

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md "What's in scope" / "What's out of scope". Does this fit? -->

- [ ] This fits the chat-only / single-tenant / SQLite shape of the project
- [ ] This does not require switching the storage layer
- [ ] This does not require adding a non-chat surface (UI, mobile app)
- [ ] If it adds an algorithm, I have a published reference
